name: Peanut Butter Pizza Cookies
recipeIngredient: 2 packages DUNCAN HINES Peanut Butter Cookie Mix
1 can DUNCAN HINES Chocolate Layer Cake Frosting
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F.
2. For cookies, place cookie mixes in a large bowl. Break up any lumps. Add eggs, contents of peanut butter packets from the mixes and water. Stir until thoroughly blended. Shape into 18 (2") balls (about 3 level tablespoons each). Place 3 1/2 inches apart on ungreased baking sheets. Flatten with bottom of a large glass dipped in sugar to make 3-inch circles. Bake at 375°F for 9-11 minutes or until set. Cool 1 minute on the baking sheets. Remove to cooling racks. Cool completely.
3. Frost cookies with Chocolate Frosting. Decorate with cashews, chocolate pieces, gumdrops and coconut. Melt white chocolate and shortening in a small saucepan on low heat, stirring constantly until smooth. Drizzle over cookies.
Makes 18 (3") cookies.
